name: Caraway Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 pork chops, each ½ inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops with garlic salt and pepper.
2. Spread Dijon mustard on one side of each pork chop.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Place sliced onions and apples at the bottom of a shallow baking dish.
5. Drizzle honey over the vegetables and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon caraway seeds.
6. Arrange the seasoned pork chops on top of the apple slices, covering each one with the remaining 1 teaspoon caraway seeds.
7. Cover the dish and bake for 1 hour.
